rule RedLine_a
{
	meta:
		id = "4Eeg9my5Llk67wiTDuBhLS"
		fingerprint = "8ba3c33d3affea6488b4fc056ad672922e243c790f16695bcf27c6dfab4ec611"
		version = "1.0"

		status = "RELEASED"
